---
title: "03. 无为与自然秩序"
subtitle: "Wu Wei and Spontaneous Order"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 3
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 3, 7, 10, 17, 23, 27, 37, 43, 48, 57, 63, and 64 map non-coercive action and self-organization onto fold dynamics and symbolic dynamical systems."
---

**Chapters:** 3, 7, 10, 17, 23, 27, 37, 43, 48, 57, 63, 64  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `dynamical systems`

{{< include articles/category_03_wu_wei_spontaneous_order.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
